page.content: The analysis of the existing model shows that there are 258 villages (39.9%) within ≤5 km, 523 villages (80.8%) within ≤10 km, and 636 villages (98.3%) within ≤15 km, with a population of 453,984 (56.0%) within ≤5 km, 710,373 (87.5%) within ≤10 km, and 802,052 (98.8%) within ≤15 km, yielding a maximum distance of 18.3 km and a mean distance of 6.5 km. The p-median model has 276 villages (42.7%) within ≤5 km, 552 villages (85.3%) within ≤10 km, and 642 villages (99.2%) within ≤15 km, accounting for a population of 472,262 (58.2%) within ≤5 km, 731,384 (90.1%) within ≤10 km, and 807,080 (99.5%) within ≤15 km, with a maximum distance of 18.3 km and a mean distance of 6.0 km.

page.content: The MCLP model consists of 270 villages (41.7%) within ≤5 km, 557 villages (86.1%) within ≤10 km, and 641 villages (99.1%) within ≤15 km, with a population of 464,771 (57.3%) within ≤5 km, 738,270 (91.0%) within ≤10 km, and 807,834 (99.6%) within ≤15 km, showing a maximum distance of 17.6 km and a mean distance of 6.1 km. The minimax model has 263 villages (40.7%) within ≤5 km, 548 villages (84.7%) within ≤10 km, and 643 villages (99.4%) within ≤15 km, representing a population of 455,836 (56.2%) within ≤5 km, 730,910 (90.1%) within ≤10 km, and 809,422 (99.8%) within ≤15 km, with a maximum distance of 16.1 km and a mean distance of 6.2 km. In the combined data, YWHAZ shows M Value at 1.75 and V Value at 0.41 for healthy cartilage, M Value at 1.88 and V Value at 0.51 for OA cartilage, with an additional YWHAZ M Value at 1.55 and V Value at 0.31. B2M has M Value at 1.18 and V Value at 0.17 for healthy cartilage, M Value at 1.10 and V Value at 0.15 for OA cartilage, with an additional B2M M Value at 1.17 and V Value at 0.18. HMBS shows M Value at 1.08 and V Value at 0.17 for healthy cartilage, M Value at 1.02 and V Value at 0.17 for OA cartilage, with an additional HMBS M Value at 1.03 and V Value at 0.20. HPRT has M Value at 0.99 and V Value at 0.15 for healthy cartilage, M Value at 0.90 and V Value at 0.14 for OA cartilage, with an additional ACTB M Value at 0.85 and V Value at 0.15. ACTB shows M Value at 0.95 and V Value at 0.17 for healthy cartilage, M Value at 0.86 and V Value at 0.16 for OA cartilage, with an additional RPL13A M Value at 0.77 and V Value at 0.17.
